title: Down The Stairs: The Game
description:
Descend into a brutal physics-driven challenge where control, planning, and precision matter more than reckless speed.

In Down The Stairs, every run is a battle against gravity and your own mistakes. On the stairs, the goal is not just to reach the end, but to stay in control and finish with as few ragdoll falls as possible. A clean descent is everything. One bad landing can break the rhythm of a perfect run.

But the challenge does not end there.

In the shaft, success is all about careful planning and smart setup. Using the Mini Shaft Editor, you place beams, shape the best possible path, and try to hit as many of them as possible to earn points. With no time pressure, you can take your time, think ahead, and refine every decision. The more effective your setup, the higher your score.

You can also measure your performance against the ghost runs of other players. Study their routes, compare their execution, and push yourself toward cleaner descents, better setups, and higher scores.

Features

- Physics-based stair runs where control and clean movement matter more than chaos

- Ragdoll-driven mistakes that punish poor timing and bad landings

- Shaft gameplay built around the Mini Shaft Editor, where you place beams and try to hit as many as possible for points

- A mix of precision movement, route learning, planning, and score chasing

- Ghost run competition that lets you compare your performance against other players

- Highly replayable runs built around mastery, optimization, and personal bests

- Unlock achievements by mastering clean descents, fast runs, and high scores

Master the Descent

Stay on your feet on the stairs. Build your score in the shaft. Learn from every fall and come back stronger.
description_short: Down The Stairs: The Game is a physics-based ragdoll challenge where every clean stair run, brutal fall, shaft setup, and ghost race pushes you toward a better score. Stay in control, hit the beams, beat other players’ ghosts, and master the descent.
